## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / utility
- [ ] New design style (token block only)
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Edited `src/` (not `dist/`) and ran `npm run build`; committed updated `dist/`
- [ ] Components reference **tokens only** (no hard-coded colors/radii/shadows)
- [ ] RTL-safe (logical properties)
- [ ] `npm run size:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:visual` passes (snapshots updated if intentional)
- [ ] Docs updated (`build_docs.py`) if behavior/markup changed
